index_hero_title: Web development environment for the Jaculus platform
index_hero_description: JacLy is a web IDE for creating programs for ESP32 microcontrollers. Development can happen either in the visual blocks editor or as text written in TypeScript.
index_template_section_desc: Choose the starting template your project will be based on.
index_template_unavailable: Templates are not available right now. You can still create a blank project and try again later.
index_template_empty: No featured templates were returned for this category yet.
index_template_fallback_description: Start from this template and adjust it inside the editor.
index_recent_empty: No projects yet. Start with a template above or create a blank project.
index_whats_new_empty: No release summary was published for this build yet.
index_blocks_desc: Design your programs with visual blocks. Ideal for beginners and rapid prototyping.
index_typescript_desc: Program your projects directly in TypeScript. Suitable for advanced users who want full control over their code.
about_description: JacLy is a web-based IDE for the Jaculus embedded systems platform.
notfound_description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
project_provider_missing_package_json: The 'package.json' file was not found. Please ensure it exists in your project and is valid.
project_delete_description: Do you really want to delete this project? This action cannot be undone.
project_empty: No projects found. Create a new project to get started.
project_new_blocks_desc: Design your project using Jacly's visual blocks.
project_new_code_desc: Code your project directly in TypeScript.
project_new_default_registers_hint: Enter a semicolon-separated list of registry URLs you want to have in your project by default.
project_id_not_found: I could not find the requested project.
project_panel_fs_create_file_prompt:
Creating new file under: {path}
Enter file name:
project_panel_fs_create_folder_prompt:
Creating new folder under: {path}
Enter folder name:
project_panel_pkg_no_project: There is problem with the project. Check 'package.json' file and make sure it exists and is valid.
project_panel_pkg_format_error: Invalid JSON format in 'package.json'. Fix the syntax error in the file explorer.
project_panel_pkg_add_help: Pick a package and version, then add it to this project.
project_panel_pkg_remove_desc: Are you sure you want to remove '{name}'? This action cannot be undone.
project_error_fs_mount_failed: Failed to mount the project filesystem. Please try reloading the page.
project_error_missing_package_json: The project is missing the 'package.json' file. Please ensure it exists and is valid.
project_error_invalid_package_json: Invalid JSON format in 'package.json'. Check for syntax errors like trailing commas or missing brackets. Auto-fix will overwrite with default template.
project_error_load_failed: Failed to load the project. Please try reloading the page.
project_error_unknown: An unknown error occurred while loading the project. Please try reloading the page.
jac_device_provider_save: The project is automatically saved on every change. Ctrl/Cmd + S is not needed.
jac_device_provider_restart: The program on the device has been restarted
jac_device_provider_outdated_package_jso: The project was created with an older version of JacLy
pwa_install_success: JacLy was installed. You can launch it from your desktop or apps list.
device_firmware_outdated: This firmware version is not supported. Minimum version required is {requiredVersion}.
project_panel_pkg_fetch_error: Failed to fetch package from registry
project_import_file_description: Upload a ZIP or TAR.GZ archive file containing your project. The project type will be automatically detected.
project_import_click_hint: Click to select an archive file
project_import_url_description: Import a project from a remote URL. Provide a direct link to a ZIP or TAR.GZ archive file.
project_import_url_hint: Enter a URL to a ZIP or TAR.GZ file
wokwi_no_device_hint: Please connect a Jaculus device to use the Wokwi Simulator.
wokwi_wrong_connection_hint: If you want to use the Wokwi Simulator, change connection type to 'Wokwi Simulator' in the device settings.
wokwi_initializing_hint: This may take up to 15 seconds (installing dependencies and starting the simulator).
editor_jacly_autosave_error: Failed to save project autosave backup
editor_jacly_recovery_description: Jacly found a valid backup ({backupName}). Replace the damaged index.jacly file with this backup? The damaged file will be preserved.
editor_jacly_recovery_kept: The damaged index.jacly file was not changed
editor_jacly_recovery_error: Failed to restore index.jacly from backup
editor_jacly_missing_packages: Some blocks in your workspace require packages that are not currently installed. Please review the missing packages and install them.
editor_jacly_installing_desc: Downloading and installing packages for your project...
project_download_no_files: No files found in project to download
project_layout_load_error: Failed to load layout settings, using default
device_wifi_ap_ssid_failed: Failed to set WiFi AP SSID
device_wifi_ap_password_failed: Failed to set WiFi AP password
config_no_device_hint: Connect a device to view and edit its configuration.
config_configure_ap_desc: Set the WiFi access point name (SSID) and password.
config_add_network_desc: Enter the SSID and password for the WiFi network you want to add.
config_remove_network_desc: Enter the SSID of the WiFi network you want to remove.
installer_subtitle: Flash custom firmware to your ESP32 device
installer_baudrate_desc: Communication speed for flashing. Higher is faster but may be less stable.
installer_variant_desc: Autodetected variant is selected by default. Do not change unless you know what you're doing.
installer_erase_yes_desc: Overrite existing files (recommended for first flash or corrupted devices)
installer_erase_no_desc: Keep existing files (useful when upgrading firmware)
installer_msg_serial_required: To install firmware, please connect using Web Serial.
installer_msg_no_firmware: No firmware found on device. Please flash the firmware first.
installer_msg_timeout_bootloader: Connection timed out. Please ensure the device is in bootloader mode and try again. To enter bootloader mode, hold the "BOOT" button while pressing the "RESET" (EN) button on your device, then release the "RESET" button followed by the "BOOT" button.
installer_msg_unsupported_chip: Unsupported chip: {chipName}. Only ESP32 family chips are supported.
installer_msg_flash_reset_hint: If you switched the device to boot mode (BOOT and RESET buttons), please click the reset button on it to return to normal mode.
installer_msg_disconnected_hint: You can now program device and have fun!
chart_panel_empty: No telemetry values found in the console stream yet.
chart_panel_empty_selection: Select at least one series to draw the chart.
